lines.english: I heard of the Guru, and so I went to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੈਸਾਰੜਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੀ ਬੇੜੀ ਚਾੜਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: sabh mukat hoaa saisaararraa naanak sachee berree chaarr jeeo |11|
lines.english: All the world is liberated, O Nanak, by embarking upon the Boat of Truth. ||11||
He instilled within me the Naam, the goodness of charity and true cleansing.
Please hear my prayer, O Dear Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸੇਵੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh srisatt seve din raat jeeo |
lines.english: The whole Universe serves You, day and night.
Now, the Merciful Lord has issued His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠੋਕਿ ਵਜਾਇ ਸਭ ਡਿਠੀਆ ਤੁਸਿ ਆਪੇ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਛਡਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: tthok vajaae sabh ddittheea tus aape leian chhaddaae jeeo |12|
lines.english: I have thoroughly tested and seen all-You alone, by Your Pleasure, can save us. ||12||
Let no one chase after and attack anyone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਵੁਠੀਆ ਇਹੁ ਹੋਆ ਹਲੇਮੀ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sabh sukhaalee vuttheea ihu hoaa halemee raaj jeeo |13|
lines.english: Let all abide in peace, under this Benevolent Rule. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਕੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਉਪਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਇਹਿ ਥਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: bahu maan keea tudh upare toon aape paaeihi thaae jeeo |14|
lines.english: I place all my faith in You; please accept me. ||14||
I speak as my Lord and Master causes me to speak.
Softly and gently, drop by drop, the Ambrosial Nectar trickles down.
O Lord, please fulfill my desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਿਆ ਮੈ ਗਲ ਵਿਚਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: dehu daras sukhadaatiaa mai gal vich laihu milaae jeeo |15|
lines.english: Grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, O Giver of Peace. Please, take me into Your Embrace. ||15||
Your devotees are forever hungry for You.
You pervade the continents, the worlds and the nether regions;
I have not found any other as Great as You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਥਾਨਿ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: toon thaan thanantar rav rahiaa naanak bhagataa sach adhaar jeeo |16|
lines.english: You are permeating all places and interspaces. Nanak: You are the True Support of Your devotees. ||16||
I am a wrestler; I belong to the Lord of the World.
I met with the Guru, and I have tied a tall, plumed turban.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਹੋਈ ਛਿੰਝ ਇਕਠੀਆ ਦਯੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: sabh hoee chhinjh ikattheea day baitthaa vekhai aap jeeo |17|
lines.english: All have gathered to watch the wrestling match, and the Merciful Lord Himself is seated to behold it. ||17||
The wrestlers enter the arena and circle around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਤੇ ਪੰਜਿ ਜੁਆਨ ਮੈ ਗੁਰ ਥਾਪੀ ਦਿਤੀ ਕੰਡਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: nihate panj juaan mai gur thaapee ditee kandd jeeo |18|
lines.english: I have thrown the five challengers to the ground, and the Guru has patted me on the back. ||18||
The bugles play and the drums beat.
All have gathered together,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਗਏ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਚਲੇ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: guramukh laahaa lai ge manamukh chale mool gavaae jeeo |19|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs reap their profits and leave, while the self-willed manmukhs lose their investment and depart. ||19||
but we shall return home by different routes.
You are without color or mark.
The Lord is seen to be manifest and present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਤੁਝੈ ਧਿਆਇਦੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sun sun tujhai dhiaaeide tere bhagat rate gunataas jeeo |20|
lines.english: Hearing of Your Glories again and again, Your devotees meditate on You; they are attuned to You, O Lord, Treasure of Excellence. ||20||
Through age after age, I am the servant of the Merciful Lord.
The Guru has cut away my bonds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਛਿੰਝ ਨ ਨਚਊ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਲਧਾ ਭਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੧॥੨॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: hau baahurr chhinjh na nchaoo naanak aausar ladhaa bhaal jeeo |21|2|29|
lines.english: I shall not have to dance in the wrestling arena of life again. Nanak has searched, and found this opportunity. ||21||2||29||
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Pehray, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਧ ਤਪੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਖਸਮ ਸੇਤੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: auradh tap antar kare vanajaariaa mitraa khasam setee aradaas |
lines.english: Upside-down, within the womb, you performed penance, O my merchant friend, and you prayed to your Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲੈ ਪਹਰੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਕੈ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਇਆ ਗਰਭਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: pahilai paharai rain kai vanajaariaa mitraa hukam peaa garabhaas |
lines.english: In the first watch of the night, O my merchant friend, you were cast into the womb, by the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮ ਸੇਤੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਉਰਧ ਧਿਆਨਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: khasam setee aradaas vakhaanai uradh dhiaan liv laagaa |
lines.english: You uttered prayers to your Lord and Master, while upside-down, and you meditated on Him with deep love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਰਜਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ਕਲਿ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਜਾਸੀ ਨਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa marajaad aaeaa kal bheetar baahurr jaasee naagaa |
lines.english: You came into this Dark Age of Kali Yuga naked, and you shall depart again naked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਪਹਿਲੈ ਪਹਰੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਇਆ ਗਰਭਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak praanee pahilai paharai hukam peaa garabhaas |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, in the first watch of the night, by the Hukam of the Lord's Command, you enter into the womb. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਕਲਮ ਵੁੜੀ ਹੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਤੈਸੀ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee kalam vurree hai masatak taisee jeearre paas |
lines.english: As God's Pen has written on your forehead, so it shall be with your soul.
